texto: Shakespeare calls jealousy yellow and green; I think it may be called black and white for it most assuredly views white as black, and black as white. The most fanciful surmises wear the aspect of truth, the greatest improbabilities appear as consistent realities.
explicacao: Citação de Mrs. Henry Wood sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Shakespeare calls jealousy yellow and green; I think it may be called black and white for it most…” articula reflexao, jealousy, black em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
